title: BENDY mod
description: Ink mod in which many different creatures and weapons, food will be added
body: This mod was created based on the Bendy Universe with many different items and weapons, a very simple and cool mod for now, of course, it will be even better in the future, I hope you like this mod and (it will be without bugs), To start crafting you just need to find ink sac and all the beginning of new things  enjoy the game and be sure to go to DISCORD there are many events and a lot of news about mods
